meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve can't scale projects (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't scale projects. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Scaling Projects via AI User Onboarding
content.seo_description: Stop manual hand-holding. Learn how to implement automated AI-driven user onboarding to scale your freelance projects using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Scaling freelance projects requires offloading manual user education to automated systems. By integrating a dynamic, AI-driven onboarding flow using Antigravity for state management and Claude Code for rapid implementation, you transform your SaaS from a time-sink into a self-service engine, allowing you to handle 10x more clients effortlessly.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, and your inbox is flooded with the same three questions from new users. You are a victim of your own success; as your project list grows, the manual overhead of onboarding new clients is cannibalizing your ability to ship new features. You aren't just building software; you're trapped in a cycle of constant, low-leverage support.

But what if your application could teach itself? By shifting from static documentation to an intelligent, context-aware onboarding flow, you reclaim your most valuable asset: your time. This case study details how to architect an automated onboarding layer that guides users to their 'Aha!' moment without you lifting a finger.

steps.title: Define the User Journey Map
steps.description: Identify the precise sequence of actions required for a user to reach the core value proposition. We use this to establish the state machine logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a state machine schema for a SaaS onboarding flow that tracks user progress across three key milestones: profile setup, initial data input, and first action completion.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Create a new onboarding-flow.ts file and implement the state machine logic generated by Antigravity.'

steps.title: Architect the Contextual AI Layer
steps.description: Inject an AI agent that monitors user interaction and triggers contextual prompts when they stall.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a hook definition for a React component that detects user idle time on the dashboard and triggers a proactive help message based on the current state.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal --execute 'npm install @antigravity/core && npx antigravity init'

steps.title: Build the Interactive Walkthrough
steps.description: Use Claude Code to scaffold a lightweight, non-intrusive UI overlay that highlights key features based on the state machine.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate code for a feature-tour component that leverages the onboarding state to conditionally render tooltips on specific DOM elements.

steps.title: Implement Event-Driven Feedback Loops
steps.description: Capture user input during onboarding to refine the AI's future suggestions for that specific user.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Define a data capture schema that stores user onboarding preferences and maps them to user metadata for future personalized experiences.
steps.claude_code_command: claude apply --patch 'update userProfile schema to include onboardingCompletionData'

steps.title: Stress Test and Optimize
steps.description: Simulate high-volume onboarding sessions to ensure the state machine handles concurrency and edge cases correctly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a suite of integration tests for the onboarding state machine that simulates rapid-fire user interactions and state transitions.

pro_tips: Always use a 'skip' state in your state machine; forcing users through onboarding creates friction that kills conversion.
Inject user-specific variables into your AI prompts to make the onboarding feel bespoke rather than generic.
Track 'time-to-first-action' as your primary KPI; if onboarding takes longer than 3 minutes, your flow is too complex.
Use Claude Code to auto-generate JSDoc comments for your state machine to ensure future maintainability.
Implement a 'Help Me' button that triggers the AI agent directly, bypassing the automated flow for power users.
content.next_steps: Deploy your onboarding flow to a staging environment and run an A/B test against a control group to measure the increase in user activation rates.
content.conversion_block: Stop manually onboarding every client and start building systems that grow with you. The shift from craftsman to architect is one toolchain away. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
